title: Premium Clear Hard Plastic Cutlery Set,Reusable Cutlery Set of 40 Pack: Forks & Spoons & Knives,for Birthday Parties Picnics Buffets BBQ's Weddings Camping
features: 【40Pcs Cutlery Set】There are 40pcs plastic cutlery set, including 10pcs plastic knives, 10pcs plastic forks and 20pcs plastic spoons, one piece of each to form a set. Sufficient quantities to meet your daily needs
【Premium Quality】Our clear cutlery is made of high quality hard plastic, safe and resistant, offers a superior dining experience. Perfect for formal events, casual gatherings, or everyday use

【Slip Resistant】The handle of travel cutlery set are designed with anti-slip groove which allow users to put fingers in to hold the cutlery well, no more worry about releasing while your are enjoying your eating
【Eco-Friendly & Convenient】Reusable and easy to clean, our cutlery sets are dishwasher safe, offering an eco-conscious alternative to disposable silverware without compromising on convenience
【Multi-purpose Use】Ideal for weddings, birthday parties, barbecues, picnics, and any event where you need reliable, attractive cutlery. Also perfect for office kitchens, catering, and home use
description: Item specifications:40pcs Size: knives:16.3cm; forks:14.5cm; spoons:14.7cm. Material:plastic Color:Transparent Note:Please allow a little error on the size due to manual measurement. The color might exist slightly difference due to different displays.
